title: Krafter's Nextbots
description: A Horror Mod that adds Naturally Spawning Nextbots.
body:
## Welcome To Krafter's Nextbots!
This mod adds easily customizable Nextbots to your game.
You can create your own or just spawn some of the premade nextbots.

Funner When Playing With Friends!
Funner When Playing On A Custom Map!

If you don't intend to mess around with nextbots and just would like to play the world normally. They do spawn on their own.

## Command is /nextbot

### WARNING:
/nextbot spawn. DOES spawn one directly ontop of you.

## Gallery

![A Nextbot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f684e062f98bcc3cb314dc7cdc5f3ab248ad9677.jpeg)
